**Evaluating strike announcement**

I need to determine if this document announces an upcoming strike. The content indicates a 24-hour strike on December 13, 2024. It mentions that the strike is an update and is confirmed due to a decision from TAR Lazio. There are guaranteed service times listed. I conclude that this document does announce a new strike and will fill the JSON with `isStrike` set to true. The start and end dates will be formatted accordingly.
